narrative:
Huntington Township has 954 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.2 percentage points.
